THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IUVO LOGISTICS, LLC. $22,935.67 PRINCIPAL, $2,625.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $3,856.71 INTEREST, $557.90 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $29,975.28, SEE SCANNED DOC
